title: RejectEntry
description: An entry in the rejection blacklist.

reason.description: The reason the address is on the blacklist.

created_at.description: When the entry was added to the blacklist.

last_event_at.description: When the last event occurred for this address.

subaccount.description: The subaccount this rejection applies to, if any.

sender.description: Sender statistics associated with the rejection.
